src/main/java/com/david/springboot/backe.general_idea: Add Jackson annotation to ignore unknown properties during JSON deserialization to prevent runtime errors.
Add spaces around the equals sign in the @Table annotation for consistent code style.
Remove trailing whitespace and empty lines to clean up the file structure.
src/main/java/com/david/springboot/backe.human_impl: Removed trailing spaces and empty lines at the end of the class.

src/main/java/com/david/springboot/backe.general_idea: Change the allowed CORS origin from port 5173 to port 3000 to match the new frontend development server.
Add a Spanish comment explaining that the interface extends CrudRepository for CRUD operations.
src/main/java/com/david/springboot/backe.human_impl: // La interfaz extiende CrudRepository, proporcionando métodos CRUD para la entidad Product con clave primaria de tipo Long.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.5.6 to align with Java 21 support and latest framework features.
Update the project's target Java version property from 17 to 21.
Add Spring Security starter to enable authentication and authorization capabilities.
Add SpringDoc OpenAPI starter to generate API documentation UI.
Add JJWT API dependency for JWT token handling.
Add JJWT implementation dependency for runtime JWT processing.
Add JJWT Jackson module for JSON serialization of JWT claims.
Add Testcontainers core library for integration testing with Docker.
Add Testcontainers JUnit Jupiter extension for test lifecycle management.
Add Testcontainers MySQL module for database integration testing.
